description: Body of unknown male found at Somerton Beach near seawall/opposite Somerton Crippled Children's Home.
photographs: Body photographs C.5-C.8 referenced; original set not fully preserved in repo.
measurements: Leane later described height as 5 ft 11 in; full autopsy measurements not acquired.
condition: Cold, damp and stiff by Moss; later embalmed before Lawson cast.
discovery: Found about 7 a.m. on 1948-12-01; evening observations at 7 p.m. and about 7:30 p.m. on 1948-11-30.
recovery: Taken by Moss in police ambulance to Royal Adelaide Hospital then City Morgue.
collector: John Moss / police; medical examination by Bennett; postmortem by Dwyer.
chain_of_custody: Beach to hospital to City Morgue is documented; later remains/burial/exhumation custody not fully reconstructed here.
examinations: Scene inspection by Moss; Bennett examination; Dwyer postmortem; Lawson cast; Durham photographs/fingerprints.
laboratory_examinations: Cowan biological specimen analysis; no body-wide modern report acquired.
report_mentions: DOC-0003 death certificate; DOC-0001 coroner remarks.
current_location: Burial/exhumation status outside acquired primary detail.
current_custodian: Unknown / official authorities pending current records.
outstanding_questions: Exact body recovery log, burial/remains chain, and current official records.
confidence: High for discovery and initial movement; Moderate for full preservation history.
notes: Body is catalogued as evidence context, not a cause-of-death conclusion.

notes: Do not treat as proven administration method.
